title: nepeta roopiana
intro: Nepeta roopiana, also known as Himalayan catmint, is a perennial herb that belongs to the mint family and is native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and alleviate respiratory problems. The health benefits of Nepeta roopiana include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Nepeta roopiana can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
